clips.headline: Hamad Al-Mansoori Fires Inside the Box!
clips.justification: A high-confidence shot (0.90) from inside the 18-yard box makes this a textbook attacking highlight that every parent will want to replay.

clips.headline: Saeed Khalifa Strikes from Inside the Box!
clips.justification: A confident in-box shot by Saeed Khalifa followed immediately by a high-intensity sprint recovery from Kiyan Makkawi gives this clip both attacking drama and defensive grit.

clips.headline: Shot from Saeed Khalifa and Big Save by Omar Al-Sayed!
clips.justification: A near-perfect shot attempt (0.92 confidence) followed by a solid goalkeeper save (0.84 confidence) creates a thrilling end-to-end moment parents will love sharing.

clips.headline: Yousef Al-Zaabi Threads a Brilliant Key Pass to Rashid Al-Marri!
clips.justification: Anchored by an outstanding high-confidence key pass (0.94) and a top-confidence defensive action (0.96), this clip showcases beautiful team combination play.

clips.headline: Kiyan Makkawi Pulls the Strings with Back-to-Back Key Passes!
clips.justification: Two consecutive high-confidence key passes (0.91 and 0.89) by Kiyan Makkawi in quick succession perfectly capture a slick team build-up that coaches and parents will admire.

clips.headline: Omar Al-Sayed Makes a Stunning Save!
clips.justification: A high-confidence goalkeeper save (0.87) keeps the score safe, exactly the kind of heroic moment proud parents love to share.

clips.headline: Rashid Al-Marri's Box Sprint Recovery and Turnover Leads to Saeed Khalifa Shot!
clips.justification: A high-confidence in-box sprint recovery (0.91), an in-box turnover leading to a shot, packs defensive intensity and attacking excitement into one unmissable sequence.

clips.headline: Hamad Al-Mansoori Blazes Back with a Lightning Sprint Recovery!
clips.justification: The highest-confidence sprint recovery in the match (0.97) paired with a strong defensive moment delivers the kind of tireless team effort that makes parents beam with pride.

clips.headline: Omar Al-Sayed Pulls Off Another Crucial Save!
clips.justification: A confident goalkeeper save (0.83) followed by a commanding defensive clearance (0.81) showcases the team's resilience under pressure in a single compelling clip.
